---
title: "face_normals"
generated: true
description: "Unit per-face normals of a triangle mesh."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.mesh`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:face_normals -->
```python
face_normals(vertices: Float[Array, 'n_vertices 3'], faces: Int[Array, 'n_faces 3']) -> Float[Array, 'n_faces 3']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:face_normals -->
Unit per-face normals of a triangle mesh.

The normalised edge cross product
$(v_1 - v_0) \times (v_2 - v_0) / \lVert \cdot \rVert$ for
each face, oriented by the face's vertex winding.  Distinct from the
un-normalised, area-weighted face cross product
[`compute_vertex_normals`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh/compute_vertex_normals.qmd) accumulates onto vertices: here each
face normal is **unit** length, so it is the per-face surface
direction
(e.g. for a face-normal-consistency regulariser or a flat-shading
normal), not an area weight.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:face_normals -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `vertices` | `Float` | `n_vertices` × `3` | — | `(n_vertices, 3)` coordinates. |
| `faces` | `Int` | `n_faces` × `3` | — | `(n_faces, 3)` vertex indices. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `n_faces` × `3`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:face_normals -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_vertices` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `3` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_faces` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
